# Wildcat

Wildcat is a premium strategic brand building and category design consultancy based in Bangalore, India. 

## Core Capabilities
- **Market Intelligence:** Uncovering market movements, audience insights, and strategic brand wins.
- **Positioning & Category Strategy:** Designing business positions that define market categories.
- **Messaging & Authority Systems:** Converting founder/corporate expertise into market trust and influence.
- **Demand & Growth Infrastructure:** Developing scalable marketing systems to convert attention into growth.

## Primary Contact & Location
- Website: https://www.wildcatdigital.in
- Location: Bangalore, India
- Email: info@wildcatdigital.in
